content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the new `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs` (1257 lines) and supporting infrastructure changes to `br.rs`, `bv.rs`, and `fixtures.rs`. The fixture builder produces a deterministic workspace with a Ready-state milestone (plan.md + plan.json materialized), a 6-node bead graph (root epic + 2 workstream epics + 3 tasks with parent-child and Blocks dependencies), and stateful dynamic mock adapters that keep `.beads/issues.jsonl` in sync with in-memory state. Command parsing correctly matches `BrCommand`-generated argv shapes (show/list/close/create/dep_add/sync_flush/robot-next). The comprehensive smoke test exercises real `BrMutationAdapter` and `BrAdapter` flows through the mocks, including close-sequence readiness via bv `--robot-next`. All test_support tests pass; the smoke test completes in sub-millisecond time. The additive changes to shared mock infrastructure (`from_dispatch`/`set_dispatch`) preserve the existing FIFO queue behavior. Clippy errors present on this branch are identical to master — pre-existing, not introduced here. No correctness gaps, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks warranting amendments.

## Amendments

None.
